Deployment & Workflow

One-stop deployment platforms, databases, payments, and email services to ship your SaaS fast.

A

AutoGen (Microsoft)

Free

Microsoft open-source multi-Agent conversation framework with flexible Agent definitions and human-in-the-loop support.

multi-agentmicrosoftframework
View details → Official site →
A

AutoGPT

Free

Autonomous AI Agent framework driven by goals, capable of decomposing and executing tasks independently.

agentautonomousai
View details → Official site →
A

AWS Amplify

Freemium

AWS full-stack application deployment platform with frontend hosting and backend一体化 for Next.js and other frameworks.

awsdeploymentbackend
View details → Official site →
C

Cloudflare Pages

Free

Cloudflare Pages 部署平台，全球 CDN 覆盖，一键从 GitHub 部署，无缝集成 Workers。

cloudflarehostingcdn
View details → Official site →
C

Cloudflare Workers

Freemium

Cloudflare edge computing platform running JavaScript/TypeScript serverless functions globally with low latency.

edgeserverlessjavascript
View details → Official site →
C

CrewAI

Free

Multi-Agent collaboration framework where multiple AI Agents work together on complex tasks through role definitions.

multi-agentframeworkai
View details → Official site →
D

Deno Deploy

Freemium

Deno/Node.js edge deployment platform with native TypeScript support and good Workers compatibility.

denoedgeserverless
View details → Official site →
D

Dify

Free

Open-source LLM application platform supporting Agent, workflows, and plugins with built-in knowledge base and API management.

llm-appagentworkflow
View details → Official site →
F

Flowise

Free

Drag-and-drop LangChain UI for building LLM applications without code. Perfect for non-engineers to rapidly prototype.

raglangchaindrag-drop
View details → Official site →
F

Fly.io

Freemium

Containerized deployment platform with apps close to users on edge nodes for excellent low latency.

containerdockeredge
View details → Official site →
L

LangChain / LangGraph

Free

LLM application development framework with Chain, Agent, and RAG support. Most mature open-source framework for AI app development.

llmframeworkrag
View details → Official site →
L

LemonSqueezy

Paid

Indie developer-friendly payment platform with 5% + $0.25 fee and one-stop global VAT compliance.

paymentssubscriptionindie-dev
View details → Official site →
L

LlamaIndex

Free

LLM data framework focused on connecting private data to LLMs with rich indexing structures and data ingestion interfaces.

ragllmframework
View details → Official site →
M

Mailgun

Freemium

Mature email sending API with high deliverability supporting bulk email sending for marketing.

emailapitransactional
View details → Official site →
M

MongoDB Atlas

Freemium

MongoDB official cloud service with multi-cloud deployment support, automatic backup and scaling.

databasemongodbnosql
View details → Official site →
N

n8n

Freemium

Open-source workflow automation platform with 400+ integrations, AI Agent support, and LangChain. Drag-and-drop interface for complex business processes.

workflowautomationopen-source
View details → Official site →
N

Neon

Freemium

Serverless PostgreSQL with database branching and instant rollback. Auto-scales based on usage.

databasepostgresqlserverless
View details → Official site →
N

Netlify

Freemium

Frontend deployment platform, JAMstack首选 with Serverless Functions and Forms support.

frontendhostingjamstack

P

PlanetScale

Freemium

MySQL-compatible serverless database with GitHub-style branching workflow and non-blocking schema changes.

databasemysqlserverless
View details → Official site →
P

Postmark

Paid

Email delivery platform focused on transactional emails with extremely high deliverability and reliability.

emailtransactionalsaas

R

Railway

Freemium

Modern application deployment platform supporting multiple languages with built-in databases for backend一体化 environments.

backenddeploymentdatabase

Redis Cloud

Freemium

Managed Redis service supporting all data structures including Strings, Hashes, Lists, Sets, Sorted Sets, Streams.

Render

Freemium

Fully managed cloud platform for web services, databases, Redis with auto HTTPS and free SSL.

backendhostingdatabase

Replit Deployments

Freemium

Replit cloud deployment capability, one-click project deployment with built-in domain and HTTPS.

hostingdeploymentquick

Resend

Freemium

Developer-friendly email API with React Email component support. 100 emails/day free, high deliverability.

Stripe

Paid

World most popular online payment platform with elegant API design. Top choice for SaaS subscriptions and Marketplaces.

Supabase

Freemium

Surge

Free

Vercel

Zeabur
